pages.text: A Nether material known as the “blood of gods.”$(br2)It can usually be found in most Nether Fortress and Bastion loot chests.
pages.title: Ichor Droplet

pages.text: Ichor Droplets can be found in most Nether loot chests.$(br2)Search these places first:$(br2)$(li)Nether Fortress chests$(br)$(li)Bastion treasure chests$(br)$(li)Bastion common chests$(br)$(li)Bastion bridge chests$(br)$(li)Bastion hoglin stable chests
pages.title: Nether Loot

pages.text: When a player wearing the Ring of the Seven Curses kills a Ghast, the Ghast drops additional Ichor Droplets.$(br2)The curse awakens the faint divinity remaining in its blood and tears, allowing Ichor to appear again.$(br2)This is one of the more stable ways to obtain it.
pages.title: Seven Curses Drop

pages.text: The Ichor Droplet is a material, not an equipable relic or scroll.$(br2)It will be used in future crafting paths related to purification, divinity, the Nether, special potions, and higher creations.
pages.title: Use
